title: cactaceae
intro: The cactaceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of flowering plants that are native to the Americas and characterized by their modified stems, which are often fleshy and succulent. Cactaceae family members, also known as cacti, have adapted to arid environments through unique features such as waxy stems, spines, and deep roots. This family comprises over 1,500 species, ranging from small, globular cacti to towering columnar species. Cactaceae are an iconic and diverse group of plants, found in a wide range of ecosystems, from deserts to grasslands.
